Cppcheck suppressions, shell scripts for tests, unit tests, code style rules, and scripts for dependencies, builds, checks, performance, memory, and webpage updates.

## Folders
- **[cppcheck](cppcheck/README.md)**: Cppcheck suppressions for wrong math calls, variable scope, and invalid pointer casts in jerry-libm.
- **[runners](runners/README.md)**: Shell scripts for running benchmarks, stability tests, compliance tests, and unit tests locally and remotely.
- **[unit-tests](unit-tests/README.md)**: Unit tests for jerry-libm functions and build commands for `gen-test-libm` executable.
- **[vera++](vera++/README.md)**: Code style rules and Tcl scripts for enforcing coding style in the JerryScript project.

## Files
- **[apt-get-install-deps.sh](apt-get-install-deps.sh.md)**: Installs necessary dependencies for building and analyzing the project using apt-get.
- **[apt-get-install-qemu-arm.sh](apt-get-install-qemu-arm.sh.md)**: Installs ARM cross-compilation tools and QEMU user static for ARM emulation on Linux.
- **[brew-install-deps.sh](brew-install-deps.sh.md)**: Installs necessary dependencies using Homebrew, including cmake and cppcheck.
- **[build.py](build.py.md)**: A build script for configuring and compiling the JerryScript engine with various options.
- **[check-cppcheck.sh](check-cppcheck.sh.md)**: A script to run cppcheck on specified directories with configurable parallel jobs and suppression lists.
- **[check-license.py](check-license.py.md)**: Checks for correct Apache License headers in specified directories and file types.
- **[check-signed-off.sh](check-signed-off.sh.md)**: A Bash script to verify the "Signed-off-by" message in the latest commit.
- **[check-vera.sh](check-vera.sh.md)**: A shell script to run Vera++ style checks on specified JerryScript source files.
- **[gen-test-libm.sh](gen-test-libm.sh.md)**: Generates and cleans unit test files for the libm library using a build script.
- **[generator.sh](generator.sh.md)**: Converts a script file into a C header file with escaped characters and line wrapping.
- **[make-log-perf-compare.sh](make-log-perf-compare.sh.md)**: A Bash script to compare performance metrics between two Git commits using ARM Linux performance notes.
- **[mem-stats-measure.sh](mem-stats-measure.sh.md)**: A script to measure and output the peak memory allocation of a test using JerryScript.
- **[perf.sh](perf.sh.md)**: A Bash script for measuring and calculating performance metrics of a specified engine and benchmark.
- **[print-unicode-ranges.sh](print-unicode-ranges.sh.md)**: A Bash script to print Unicode ranges based on specified categories and interval options.
- **[rss-measure.sh](rss-measure.sh.md)**: A Bash script to measure and report the maximum RSS memory usage of a process.
- **[run-mem-stats-test.sh](run-mem-stats-test.sh.md)**: Shell script to test memory statistics of JavaScript engines with optional output formatting.
- **[run-perf-test.sh](run-perf-test.sh.md)**: A Bash script to run performance tests comparing two engine builds, with optional markdown output.
- **[run-tests.py](run-tests.py.md)**: A script to run various tests and checks for the JerryScript project, including unit tests and build options.
- **[settings.py](settings.py.md)**: Defines directory paths and script locations for JerryScript testing and build tools.
- **[sort-fails.sh](sort-fails.sh.md)**: A Bash script to sort and document failing test cases using Valgrind and MD5 hashing.
- **[update-webpage.sh](update-webpage.sh.md)**: A Bash script to update a webpage by processing markdown files and adjusting links and images.
